title: EmergencyIncident
description: An emergency response incident coordinated or logged by NYC Emergency Management — structural collapses, utility outages, hazardous conditions, and other multi-agency events. Canonical schema reconciling the high-traffic 'Emergency Response Incidents' dataset (pasr-j7fb). Keyed on incident type, location, and creation date.

incidentType.description: Nature of the incident ('Incident Type'), e.g. Structural, Utility, Hazmat, Weather.

creationDate.description: When the incident was opened ('Creation Date').

closedDate.description: When the incident was closed ('Closed Date'); null while active.
